zh.lifeSummary: 當Michael Reichel於大約1572年出生在德國薩辛姆尼次時，他的父親Georg Reichel40歲，母親Margreth Mittelbach36歲。他於1624年8月29日與Christina在德國薩辛米特勒勒 艾爾茲格比斯可萊斯倫格費爾德結婚。他去世於1649年2月7日在德國薩辛米特勒勒 艾爾茲格比斯可萊斯貝利次享年78歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Michael Reichel于大约1572年出生在德国薩辛姆尼次时，他的父亲Georg Reichel40岁，母亲Margreth Mittelbach36岁。他于1624年8月29日与Christina在德国薩辛米特勒勒 艾爾茲格比斯可萊斯倫格費爾德结婚。他去世于1649年2月7日在德国薩辛米特勒勒 艾爾茲格比斯可萊斯貝利次享年78岁。

nameMeanings.name: Reichel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Otto, Arno, Fritz, Gerhardt, Heinz, Helmut, Herwig, Rudi, Ulrich, Wolfgang.
German: from a pet form of any of several ancient Germanic personal names formed with the ancient Germanic element rīc ‘power’.
Jewish (Ashkenazic): from the Yiddish female personal name Raykhl, a pet form of Raykhe, which in turn is derived from Yiddish raykh ‘rich’.

variants.name: Reichelt
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Erna, Gerhard, Klaus, Lothar, Reiner, Wilhelm.

variants.name: Reichle
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Albrecht, Claus, Fritz, Hans, Otto, Wieland.

variants.name: Reichl
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Otto, Gunter, Hans.

variants.name: Rajchel
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Polish Jozef, Janusz, Ryszard.

nameMeanings.name: Michael
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of a common biblical name (meaning ‘who is like God?’ in Hebrew) borne by one of the archangels, the protector of the ancient Hebrews, who is also regarded as a saint of the Catholic Church. In the Middle Ages, Michael was regarded as captain of the heavenly host (see Revelation 12:7–9), symbol of the Church Militant, and patron of soldiers. He was often depicted bearing a flaming sword. The name is also borne by a Persian prince and ally of Belshazzar mentioned in the Book of Daniel. Since the early 1900s it has been one of the most enduringly popular boys' names in the English-speaking world.  See also  Michal .

en.lifeSummary: When Michael Reichel was born about 1572, in Chemnitz, Saxony, Germany, his father, Georg Reichel, was 40 and his mother, Margreth Mittelbach, was 36. He married Christina on 29 August 1624, in Lengefeld, Mittlerer Erzgebirgskreis, Saxony, Germany. He died on 7 February 1649, in Zöblitz, Mittlerer Erzgebirgskreis, Saxony, Germany, at the age of 78.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Michael Reichel est né environ 1572, à Chemnitz, Sachsen, Allemagne, son père, Georg Reichel, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Margreth Mittelbach, avait 36 ans. Il a épousé Christina le 29 août 1624, à Lengefeld, Mittlerer Erzgebirgskreis, Sachsen, Allemagne. Il est décédé le 7 février 1649, à Zöblitz, Mittlerer Erzgebirgskreis, Sachsen, Allemagne, à l’âge de 78 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Michael Reichel um 1572 in Chemnitz, Sachsen, Deutschland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Georg Reichel 40 und seine Mutter Margreth Mittelbach 36. Er hat am 29. August 1624 in Lengefeld, Mittlerer Erzgebirgskreis, Sachsen, Deutschland Christina geheiratet. Er starb am 7. Februar 1649 im Alter von 78 Jahren in Zöblitz, Mittlerer Erzgebirgskreis, Sachsen, Deutschland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Michael Reichel è nato il circa 1572 nel Chemnitz, Sachsen, Germania, il suo padre, Georg Reichel, aveva 40 anni e il suo madre, Margreth Mittelbach, aveva 36 anni. Lui sposato Christina il 29 agosto 1624, nel Lengefeld, Mittlerer Erzgebirgskreis, Sachsen, Germania. Morì il 7 febbraio 1649, nel Zöblitz, Mittlerer Erzgebirgskreis, Sachsen, Germania, all'età di 78 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Michael Reichelが約1572年にドイツサチセンケムニッツで生まれた時，父Georg Reichelは40歳，母Margreth Mittelbachは36歳であった。1624年8月29日にドイツサチセンミットラーエル エルズジェバーグスクレイスレンジェフエルドでChristinaと結婚した。彼は1649年2月7日にドイツサチセンミットラーエル エルズジェバーグスクレイスズoブリッツで78歳で死去した。

ko.Stolzenhain, Wünschendorf, Mittlerer Erz: 독일 작센 미틀레레어 르즈그비르그스크레이스 wu슈도르프 스톨즌하인

ko.Stolzenhain,Chemnitz,Saxony: 독일 작센 미틀레레어 르즈그비르그스크레이스 wu슈도르프 스톨즌하인
ko.Rauenstein, Chmntz, Sxny: 독일 작센 미틀레레어 르즈그비르그스크레이스 렌그펠드 라스타인
ko.lifeSummary: Michael Reichel(이)가 대략 1572년 독일 작센 체니츠에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Georg Reichel(은)는 40세였고, 그의 어머니 Margreth Mittelbach(은)는 36세였다. 그는 1624년 8월 29일 독일 작센 미틀레레어 르즈그비르그스크레이스 렌그펠드에서 Christina(와)과 결혼했다. 그는 1649년 2월 7일 독일 작센 미틀레레어 르즈그비르그스크레이스 즈o블리츠에서 78세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Michael Reichel nasceu aproximadamente 1572, em Chemnitz, Sachsen, Alemanha, seu pai, Georg Reichel, tinha 40 anos e sua mãe, Margreth Mittelbach, tinha 36 anos. Ele casou-se com Christina em 29 de agosto de 1624, em Lengefeld, Mittlerer Erzgebirgskreis, Sachsen, Alemanha. Ele faleceu em 7 de fevereiro de 1649, em Zöblitz, Mittlerer Erzgebirgskreis, Sachsen, Alemanha, com 78 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Michael Reichel родился около 1572 г. в местности чемниц, сачсен, Германия, его отцу по имени Georg Reichel было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Margreth Mittelbach, 36. Он женился на женщине по имени Christina 29 августа 1624 г. в местности ленгефелд, миттлирир эрзгебиргскрис, сачсен, Германия. Он умер 7 февраля 1649 г. в местности зoблиц, миттлирир эрзгебиргскрис, сачсен, Германия в возрасте 78 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Michael Reichel nació aproximadamente 1572, en Chemnitz, Sachsen, Alemania, su papá, Georg Reichel, tenía 40 años y su mamá, Margreth Mittelbach, tenía 36 años. Se casó con Christina el 29 de agosto de 1624, en Lengefeld, Mittlerer Erzgebirgskreis, Sachsen, Alemania. Murió el 7 de febrero de 1649, en Zöblitz, Mittlerer Erzgebirgskreis, Sachsen, Alemania, a la edad de 78 años.
